name: Post-Incident Review
description: Generates a comprehensive post-incident review (PIR) report after an incident has been resolved. A code node collects the investigation timeline, actions taken, and IOCs found. Riggs AI then produces a detailed PIR covering timeline reconstruction, root cause analysis, impact assessment, lessons learned, and recommendations for improving detection and response. The report goes through IR lead approval before being filed as a Jira ticket, distributed to stakeholders via email, and shared with the SOC team on Slack.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create post-incident review document ticket for formal record keeping

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Share lessons learned and PIR summary with the SOC team

config.description: Manually triggered after an incident has been resolved to initiate the post-incident review process

config.query: SELECT al.timestamp, al.action, al.actor, al.details FROM audit_log al WHERE al.investigation_id = '{{trigger_1.investigation_id}}' ORDER BY al.timestamp ASC
config.description: Collect the full investigation timeline, all actions taken, IOCs discovered, and enrichment results for the PIR

config.additional_instructions: Generate a comprehensive post-incident review: timeline, root cause analysis, impact assessment, lessons learned, and recommendations for improving detection and response.
config.description: AI-powered post-incident review generation covering all aspects of the incident lifecycle

config.approval_message: Please review the AI-generated post-incident review report for accuracy and completeness before distribution to stakeholders.
config.description: IR lead reviews and approves the post-incident review report before it is distributed
Create a formal post-incident review document ticket in Jira for record keeping and tracking
Distribute the approved post-incident review report to all stakeholders via email
Share lessons learned and key takeaways from the PIR with the SOC team on Slack
Mark the investigation as closed after the post-incident review has been completed and distributed
Post-incident review complete — report approved, filed, and distributed to stakeholders
